section_prompts.prompt: Generate a sidebar navigation with: Dashboard (active), Analytics, Reports, Users, Orders, Settings
Generate 4 stat cards in a grid: Total Users (24,891, +4.2%), Revenue ($182,430, +11.7%), Orders (3,047, -2.1%), Uptime (99.97%)
Generate a users table with columns: #, Name, Email, Role, Status, Joined. Include 10 sample rows with colored status badges.
Generate a recent orders table with columns: Order ID, Product, Amount, Date, Status. Include 10 sample rows.
